intro: The cryptocurrency sector was the primary target in a concentrated wave of attacks documented between April 12 and April 20, 2026. The thirteen incidents, comprising ten high and three critical severity alerts, also heavily impacted decentralized finance (DeFi), financial-services, telecommunications, and venture capital. Activity spanned North America, Europe, the United Kingdom, Canada, and Kyrgyzstan. The threat actors FakeWallet, Lazarus Group, and Omnistealer were prominently active, with exploitation of the critical vulnerability CVE-2023-4863 featuring across the reported campaigns.
